productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Casual Black Sandals
description: Casual dressing only gets better with these sandals from red tape. This pair is a great combination of style and functionality - they're a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence.UpperLeather upper covering the forefoot and midfoot for maximum durability, breathability and styleCushioned textile lining for added comfortStitch detailing and woven design for added strengthRemovable ankle strap with velcro closuresCushioned, curved, suede covered footed for maximum breathability, sweat-free protection and all-day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole in ergonomic design with branch shaped seam and lugs for maximum grip on smooth surfacesSandal careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
